title: An Interview with Stoneaxe Tabletop Gaming - Solo RPGs, Music, Old stuff, and more
body:
Daniel has an engaging conversation with Paul from Stone Axe Tabletop Gaming. The two discuss their shared love for solo role-playing games (RPGs) and old, obscure board games. They touch on topics such as the role of music in Paul’s videos, their experiences with games like Fallout: New Vegas, Forbidden Psalm, and Mork Borg, and their appreciation for creative and often unconventional artwork in games.

The discussion also explores solo play mechanics, Paul’s RuneCairn campaign, and their methods of adapting games for solo or group play. They also mention various games they’re excited about, such as Iron Falcon 75 and the dystopian RPG Slay Industries.

This laid-back chat between two passionate gamers is perfect for anyone interested in solo RPGs, retro games, or simply getting a behind-the-scenes look at the world of tabletop gaming.
